claim: A single new AI model will eliminate all cybersecurity breaches and guaranteed zero downtime across every enterprise network.
sources: Press release with no independent benchmark
facts: No production system can guarantee absolute zero incidents.
Security posture depends on people, process, and layered controls.
gaps: Uses absolute language without falsifiable scope.
No audited third-party validation across environments.
next_step: Rewrite into measurable subclaims and require independent validation before decisions.

claim: By 2028, on-device LLM inference is likely to handle most enterprise assistant queries at lower cost than cloud-only deployments.
sources: Enterprise pilot studies on hybrid inference
facts: Edge accelerators continue to improve tokens-per-watt.
Many assistant queries are short and privacy-sensitive, favoring local inference.
gaps: Costs vary by model size and enterprise governance requirements.
next_step: Track TCO across matched workloads over the next 4 quarters.

claim: The S&P 500 closed higher on 2025-12-31 than on 2025-01-02.
facts: Daily closing values for both dates are published by multiple market data providers.
next_step: Use verified index values in reporting.

claim: The new retrieval pipeline is cheaper and more accurate, because it uses smaller embeddings, and latency dropped after we changed caching.
facts: Average query latency decreased after cache policy update.
Embedding compute cost dropped after dimensionality reduction.
gaps: Accuracy gains were not consistent across all benchmark slices.
Multiple simultaneous changes make attribution difficult.
next_step: Decompose and test each causal subclaim independently.

claim: U.S. defense AI infrastructure programs will likely prioritize resilient domestic GPU and secure data-center capacity over the next five years.
facts: Recent policy documents emphasize resilience and supply-chain security.
Program funding trends indicate sustained investment in secure compute capacity.
gaps: Procurement outcomes can shift with administration and budget cycles.
next_step: Monitor FY budget marks and program objective memoranda updates.

claim: Coinbase will dominate agent payments and USDC will become the primary settlement layer for AI agents
